headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Church & Dwight Co, Raises Price Target to $110
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Chris Carey   maintains Church & Dwight Co (NYSE:CHD) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $105 to $110.
